- Use business language that sounds reviewable and reliable. ## Example Approved Phrases - Turn brand and campaign knowledge into reusable context. - Keep ad drafting grounded in approved messaging. - Reduce repeated manual work across campaign creation. - Build a clearer workf

# Audience Personas ## Purpose This file defines the audiences most likely to buy Agentic OneBotAds, an AI-assisted ads and marketing operations product. This is starter content. Validate and refine it with first-party data from: - GA4 demographic and acquisition reports - Sea

analysis.main_problem: Some campaigns are spending budget without matching conversion efficiency.
insights: LinkedIn SMEs is the strongest revenue-efficient segment.
Improve the weakest campaign with a sharper, benefit-led hook.

creative.headline: Boost Your Marketing Efficiency with AI-Powered Automation
creative.primary_text: SMEs and marketing teams are struggling with time-consuming ad campaigns. Agentic OneBotAds delivers AI-driven automation that cuts manual work by 50% while boosting ROI. Scale your marketing operations without the guesswork.
creative.description: Our platform streamlines ad creation, audience targeting, and performance tracking with intelligent automation. Reduce workload, improve campaign accuracy, and focus on strategic growth. Perfect for busy teams needing smarter marketing solutions.

ab_variants.headline: Transform Your Marketing Workflow with AI
ab_variants.primary_text: Tired of manual ad management? Agentic OneBotAds automates campaign creation, targeting, and optimization. Save 50% of your team's time while achieving better results. Ideal for SMEs seeking scalable marketing solutions.

ab_variants.headline: Cut Costs, Boost ROI with Intelligent Ads
ab_variants.primary_text: Marketing teams waste hours on manual ad campaigns. Our AI-powered platform automates the process, reducing workload by 50% and improving campaign performance. Scale your efforts without increasing headcount.

image.image_prompt: Create a brand-safe campaign visual background for Agentic OneBotAds, aimed at SMEs and marketing teams, optimized for LinkedIn publication format. Use a polished commercial advertising style, strong focal subject cues, clean composition, premium lighting, soft depth, negative space for text overlay, high quality, no text, no words, no letters, no logos, no watermark, no fake UI, no readable labels.
image.negative_prompt: words, letters, text, watermark, logo, distorted UI, unreadable dashboard, blurry, low quality, fake brand marks
image.alt_text: Campaign visual background for Agentic OneBotAds.

quick_wins.reason: It is the strongest ROAS campaign in the current dataset.

quick_wins.recommendation: Reduce spend on CAMP001 until fresh creative is tested.
quick_wins.reason: Some campaigns are spending budget without matching conversion efficiency.

strategic_changes.recommendation: Tighten audience targeting and remove low-intent segments.
strategic_changes.reason: CPA is elevated relative to the current conversion efficiency.

strategic_changes.recommendation: Create a second creative focused on time savings for SMEs.
strategic_changes.reason: SME-oriented efficiency messaging fits the current product positioning.

ab_tests: Test benefit-focused headline vs. automation-focused headline.
Test dashboard visual vs. team-at-work visual.

final_safe_version.headline: Boost Your Marketing Efficiency with AI-Powered Automation
final_safe_version.caption: SMEs and marketing teams are struggling with time-consuming ad campaigns. Agentic OneBotAds delivers AI-driven automation that cuts manual work by 50% while boosting ROI. Scale your marketing operations without the guesswork.

Improve the weakest campaign with a sharper, benefit-led hook.

Tighten audience targeting and remove low-intent segments.
Create a second creative focused on time savings for SMEs.
